name: stata-skill
description: Stata skills for Claude Code — comprehensive reference and C/C++ plugin development

plugins.name: stata
plugins.description: Comprehensive Stata reference for writing correct Stata code — covers syntax, data management, econometrics, causal inference, graphics, Mata, and 20 community packages.

plugins.name: stata-c-plugins
plugins.description: Develop high-performance C/C++ plugins for Stata using the stplugin.h SDK. Covers SDK setup, data flow, memory safety, .ado wrappers, cross-platform compilation, performance optimization, debugging, packaging, and translating Python/R packages into Stata.

plugins.name: stata-bundle
plugins.description: Both Stata skills in one install — comprehensive Stata reference plus C/C++ plugin development for Stata.
